title: Proxi's Vanilla Ultimate
description: Game optimization and vanilla-style enhancements perfect for both single and multi player
body:
![Proxi's Vanilla Ultimate banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4b33539583ec72add8e124fafef2ead94df1c08_0.webp) ##

About Vanilla Ultimate About 4 months ago, my friends and I started a Minecraft server with a bunch of vanilla+ mods. It was super fun, but a lot of stuff was buggy. So I decided to make a proper vanilla-style modpack and post it to Modrinth. That way, my friends and I could enjoy it. And we have been ever since! The modpack has gone through a LOT of updates since the original release. I'm always adding new content to keep the gameplay fresh.

##

But what does Vanilla Ultimate add? - **New biomes** 🌎 - **New and improved structures** 🏰 - **Visual tweaks** 🎨 - **ALL the optimization** ⚡ - **Audio enhancements** 🔊 - **Vanilla-friendly Nether and End touchups** 🌌 - **Lots of new multiplayer features** 👥 - **And many more gameplay, QOL, and graphic enhancements!**

##

Performance Info It is recommended to dedicate **4GB - 6GB** of RAM for the best experience. However, if you don't play singleplayer, and are just joining a server, **2GB** of RAM _can_ work. If you have a lower-end PC and are struggling to run the modpack, a super optimized version of the modpack will release sometime soon after the 4.0 update drops. **[Join the Discord server](https://discord.gg/gvcF3v2qJG) if you want to keep up with that.** You can also host the modpack on a server so that your computer doesn't have to work as hard (see below)

##

Get a fast and affordable Minecraft server from BisectHosting! ###

**[Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/proxi?r=superiorsmeltingmodrinth)** provides the best quality Minecraft hosting at actually affordable prices. [To grab one of their top-notch servers while also supporting me, click here.](https://www.bisecthosting.com/proxi?r=superiorsmeltingmodrinth) And, if you enter promo code **PROXI** at checkout, you'll get 25% off. You can try it for a month, and if for some reason you don't like it, you can cancel the renewal with no penalties or fees. ##

Join the Discord server!

If you're having issues with something or have a suggestion to make, the Discord server is a great place to do it! You can also share your Minecraft build screenshots, send your best memes, talk with the community, and keep up to date with the latest and greatest information about what I'm working on for Minecraft. ##
Known Issues - There's a longtime bug with horses where, when looking down at water or entities through a horse, they will be invisible. If you aren't running shaders, this can be fixed by just changing your graphics to Fabulous. With shaders, I can't seem to find a fix. It's unclear if this will ever be fixed. I'll try to set out some time to talk to the dev and see if it's possible to fix at all. - Visual Workbench causes smithing tables and fletching tables generated in structures to have the crafting table UI. It isn't game breaking. If you pick the block up and place it back down it will have the correct UI. - Hammers are unaffected by the Sturdy enchantment. - Trimmable Tools doesn't support applying More Armor Trims patterns to tools. It doesn't crash when you apply them, it just doesn't display anything. The dev is not interested in adding compatibility due to the large amount of new texturing required, so maybe something for me to do myself at some point. (Update 4.0 to Vanilla Ultimate will patch this) - Bshrines enchantments don't have descriptions (I tried to get the descriptions set up before 3.0.0 release, but for some reason it just wouldn't work. Hoping to get it fixed within the next few updates) - If you have recipes pinned in the crafting table, you will crash when opening a smithing table. Very odd bug, but it has been reported and should be fixed soon. - The extra variants of prismarine blocks added by Stoneworks can't activate a conduit when used instead of the vanilla variants. The list of blocks that can activate conduits appears to be hardcoded by Mojang. - the modpack creator is very stupid so he keeps messing stuff up (though not recently)
_Below, you'll find a list of every single mod, datapack, and shader, and a brief description of what it adds. Credit for all these amazing additions goes to their respective owners/developers. Without their hard work and dedication, this modpack would not exist._ ### Mods (slightly out of date) - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Replaces the usually flat second layer of player skins with a 3d modeled version. - [Additional Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures) - This mod adds ~200 new small and medium sized structures into the game to expand your world! - [AdoraBuild: Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorabuild-structures) - Adds 100 new structures like houses, castles, temples, hidden treasures, etc. to enhance the world exploration. Generated structures are biome specific and fit perfectly into the environment. - [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) - Replaces those boring, anti-climactic advancement popups with fancy glowing plaques. - [AfkPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/afkplus) - Show which players are AFK in the player list - [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - Adds a rich ambience to the minecraft world. - [Amethyst Beacon Base [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-amethyst-beacon-base) - Enables amethyst blocks and budding amethyst blocks as blocks for a beacon base. Additionally enables amethyst shards as beacon payment items. - [Animal Feeding Trough](https://modrinth.com/mod/animal_feeding_trough) - Adds a feeding trough that animals will automatically eat out of to breed. - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Adds various food-related HUD improvements. - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - Dependency - [Armadillo Brush Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/armadillo-brush-fix) - Dependency - [AudioPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer) - Enables uploading custom audio for music discs and goat horns. - [Auditory Continued](https://modrinth.com/mod/auditory-continued) - Expands and improves upon block sounds, item sounds, and more! - [Axolotl Buckets](https://modrinth.com/mod/axolotl-buckets) - Allows axolotls in buckets to have their own icon depending on their color and age! - [Axolotls Ignore Passives [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpack-axolotls-ignore-passives) - Prevents axolotls from hunting passive mobs like tropical fish, squid, and tadpoles. - [Bad Horse Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/bad-horse-fix) - Fixes horse markings appearing above horse armor when using Iris or Oculus. - [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) - A collection of mostly micro optimizations that add up to something bigger! - [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) - Dependency - [Banner Bedsheets](https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-bedsheets) - Customize your bedsheets with any banner design! - [Banner Flags](https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-flags) - Place banners horizontally as flags on fences, walls and other pole-like blocks! - [Bedrockify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockify) - Implements some useful Minecraft Bedrock Edition features into Minecraft Java Edition. - [Better Climbing](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-climbing) - Improves some things related to climbing - [Better Compatibility Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-compatibility-checker) - Displays a checkmark if server and client modpack version match or an X if they do not. - [Better Controls](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-controls) - Adds several new keybindings and many configurable options for how sprinting, sneaking, and flying should behave. - [Better F1 Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f1-reborn) - Hides only the HUD using F1. - [Better Gold Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-gold-recycling) - Smelt larger gold items for ingots and smaller items for nuggets - [Better Hanging Signs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-hanging-signs) - Enables hanging signs to hold items. - [Better Iron Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-iron-recycling) - Smelt larger iron items for ingots and smaller items for nuggets - [Better Mace](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mace) - Makes the smash attack of the mace feel like a real smash attack. - [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount - [Better Ping Display [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list. - [Better Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb) - Adds brewing, smithing, and QOL changes to the vanilla recipe book! (and is my more simple, closer to vanilla alternative to JEI/REI -Proxi) - [Better Sniffers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-sniffers) - Improves sniffers by allowing them to naturally spawn in villages, increasing the variety of loot they can find beyond the current two useless flowers, and providing renewable sand. (I usually turn off the spawning in villages part with "/scoreboard players set SpawnSniffersInVillages sniff 0" -Proxi) - [Better Spawner Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-spawner-control) - Disables mob spawners whenever they are surrounded by 5 torches. - [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - Improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful. - [Better Stoneworking](https://modrinth.com/datapack/improved-stone-smelting) - Adds more shortcut recipes for stone, cobblestone, sandstone, smooth sandstone, smooth stone and deepslate. - [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) - Adds independent rotation of the camera in third person. - [Better Tridents](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-tridents) - Adds a crafting recipe and a few new tweaks and features to the trident. - [Better Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterwalls) - Fixes connections between fences, walls, panes, bars and nether fences. - [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - Replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD. - [Better Shields]( https://modrinth.com/mod/bettershields) - Client side QOL features for shields - [Bigger Sponge Absorption Radius](https://modrinth.com/mod/bigger-sponge-absorption-radius) - Each extra sponge block placed next to one another increases the water absorption radius. - [Biome Sniffer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/locate-biome-sniffer) - Use the sniffer to locate biomes. - [Blasting Smelts Glass [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpack-blasting-smelts-glass) - Allows smelting glass in the blast furnace. - [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus) - Spices up the boring vanilla blur effect – featuring animations, colors and lots of customizability! - [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance. - [Bow Infinity Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/bow-infinity-fix) - Removes need to have an arrow in your inventory to use the Infinity enchant on your bow or crossbow. - [Brainier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/brainier-bees) - Refactors, improves, and fixes Bee behavior in the modern Brain AI system! - [Breed Axolotl With Tropical Fish Item [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpack-breed-axolotl-with-tropical-fish-item) - Allows breeding axolotls with the tropical fish item as well as the bucket. - [CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada) - Dependency - [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs). - [Cake Chomps](https://modrinth.com/mod/cake-chomps) - Adds sound and crumb particles when you eat cake. - [Calm down, dog!](https://modrinth.com/mod/calm-down-dog) - Calm down your dogs by petting them. - [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods. - [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) - Adds the white ash particle from the Basalt Deltas biome to the underground to simulate dust! - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - See who you're chatting with! - [Cherry Grove Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cherry-villages) - A completely new vanilla like village in minecraft Cherry Grove biome! - [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker) - Client side item storage - remember where you've put things. - [Chunks fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) - A simple mod that adds fade-in animation for chunks! - [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) - Pre-generates chunks, quickly and efficiently. - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Dependency - [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) - Clumps XP orbs together to reduce lag. - [Cobweb](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobweb) - Dependency - [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) - Dependency - [Colorize](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorize) - Right click with the dye on some blocks to color them! - [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts) - Adds sleeping bags and hammocks for, respectively, portability and turning day to night, without setting new spawns. Comes in 16 different colors! - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - Improves the chunk performance of Minecraft. - [Connected Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/connected-doors) - Allows double doors to open and close together. - [Connectible Chains [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectiblechains) - Connect your fences with a decorative chain! - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Allows for efficient connected textures. - [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu. - [Copper Block Beacon Base [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-copper-block-beacon-base) - Allows using any solid copper block in a beacon base. Also allows using copper ingots as a beacon payment item - [Copper Hopper](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-hopper) - Hopper that acts as a simple item filter. - [Copper Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-recycling) - Recycle a variety of copper blocks into copper ingots. - [CoroUtil](https://modrinth.com/mod/coroutil) - Dependency - [Craftable Bells](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-bell) - Makes the bell craftable. - [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) - Dependency - [Cristel Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/cristel-lib) - Dependency - [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) - Allows you to play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window. - [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) - Adds culling to leaf blocks, providing a huge performance boost over vanilla. - [Cut Through](https://modrinth.com/mod/cut-through) - Cleanly swing through transparent blocks like tall grass to hit mobs without breaking said block. - [Data API](https://modrinth.com/datapack/developer-resources) - Dependency - [Death Backup](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-backup) - Creates back-ups of player inventories before death, which can be loaded via commands. - [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker. - [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) - More detail about armor in Armor bar! - [Diamond Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/diamond-recycling) - Recycle diamond tools, diamond armor, and smithing templates into diamonds through crafting. - [Dimension Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimension-viewer) - A highly customisable server-side mod for viewing which dimension each player is currently in. - [Disconnect Packet Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/disconnect-packet-fix) - Works around the MC-271325 bug on Fabric servers (fixes "error sending packet clientbound/minecraft:disconnect") - [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - See farther without turning your game into a slide show. - [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) - Microsoft flight simulator for Minecraft elytras. - [Drogstyle](https://modrinth.com/mod/drogstyle) - Simple, self-assigned display names. A (drogtor-like) UX wrapper for Styled Nicknames. - [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) - A Structure Datapack adding dungeons, taverns and other structures to find while you explore the world. - [Dungeons+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons+) - Revamps the look of vanilla dungeons and introduces biome-specific dungeon types. - [Durability Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-tooltip) - Durability Tooltip shows you the durability of an item! - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle. - [Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) - Be ready for overhauled anvils! Items stay, better name tags, many tweaks! - [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) - Enchanting tables as they always should have been! Items stay after closing, and easy re-rolls. - [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) - A mod that adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items. - [Effect Timer Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/effecttimerplus) - Adds a potency and time indicator overlay to status effect icons. - [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims) - Customizable elytra mod with trims, banner patterns and more! - [Elytra Trims Extensions](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims-extensions) - Elytra Trims additions for other mods. - [Enchant Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchant-tooltips) - Adds more customization to enchantment tooltips, like showing the max level, and more. - [Endless Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/endless-music) - Removes the long pauses between background music. - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises, and improve their visuals - [EnhancedVisuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) - Provides a more immersive experience by adding effects to the HUD. (Note that I have turned off everything except Low HP heartbeat in the config - Proxi) - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Uses async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible. - [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify) - A simplistic, vanilla-friendly collection of new structures. - [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) - Makes the explosion animation look cooler. - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Dependency - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - Dependency - [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks. - [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) - Break down your trees by only cutting one piece of it. - [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) - Yeet the laggy reversed DNS lookup for literal IP server addresses. - [Fast Trading](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-trading) - Adds a button to the villager trading GUI to repeat the current trade until it's no longer available again. - [Faster Random](https://modrinth.com/mod/faster-random) - A significantly faster Random Generator implementation for Minecraft, with near vanilla parity. - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations. - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - Dependency - [Forgetful Sniffers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/forgetful-sniffer) - Sniffers can now repeatedly dig up seeds in the same block. - [Formations (Structure library)](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations) - Dependency - [Formations Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-nether) - Formations Nether adds plenty of new structures to the nether! - [Formations Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-overworld) - Formations Overworld adds plenty of new structures to the overworld! - [FoxGlow](https://modrinth.com/mod/foxglow) - Makes foxes and players glow when they eat glow berries or other glowy items! - [Freecam (Modrinth Edition)](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - A highly customizable freecam mod. - [Friends & Foes (Fabric/Quilt)](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) - Adds outvoted and forgotten mobs from the mob vote, expanding on their original concepts and adding new vanilla-like features. - [Friends&Foes - Beekeeper Hut (Fabric/Quilt)](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-beekeeper-hut-fabric) - An addon for the Friends&Foes mod, adding a beekeeper hut structure. - [Friends&Foes - Flowery Mooblooms (Fabric/Quilt)](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-flowery-mooblooms-fabric) - An addon for the Friends&Foes mod, adding one moobloom variant for each flower. - [FrozenLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/frozenlib) - Dependency - [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config) - Dependency - [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - Dependency - [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic) - A subtle-ish overhaul of vanilla Overworld biomes! Reworked! - [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks) - Ship default Data- & Resourcepacks with Modpacks! (Godsend for me for datapacks - Proxi) - [Glow Ink Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/glow-ink-plus) - Add more functions to the glow ink, in this mod you can make the wool and carpets glow. - [Glowing Torchflower](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowing-torchflower) - Makes the Torchflower glow. - [Hammer Mace](https://modrinth.com/mod/hammer-mace) - Allows the mace to crack stone. - [Hearths](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hearths) - A handful of additions to vanilla Nether biomes - [Highlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlight) - Highlight changes the visualization of specific blocks in the game to have more aligned selections to their models. - [Hoe Effective Cactus [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-hoe-effective-cactus) - Adds cactus to the 'hoe' mineable tag, allowing it to be broken quickly. - [Hoe Effective Froglights [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-hoe-effective-froglights) - Adds froglights to the hoe mineable tag, allowing them to be mined faster. - [Hopo Better Mineshaft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-mineshaft) - More and better mineshafts to explore. - [Hopo Better Ruined Portals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-ruined-portals) - Improve how the portals look in your world. - [Hopo Better Underwater Ruins](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-underwater-ruins) - Explore new ocean ruins to your world. - [Horse Buff](https://modrinth.com/mod/horsebuff) - QOL tweaks for horses. - [Horseshoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseshoes) - A mod that adds enchantable horseshoes that you can equip to horses! - [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg) - Dependency - [Idwtialsimmoedm](https://modrinth.com/mod/idwtialsimmoedm) - I didn't want to install a library so I made my own Enchantment Descriptions mod. - [Image2Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/image2map) - Turn images into maps! (This is only available with cheats enabled, and will be removed in a future update - Proxi) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft. - [ImmersiveThunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder) - Adds realistic and dynamic thunder sounds to Minecraft based on the player’s distance from the lightning strike. - [Improved Signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/improved-signs) - Passthrough signs, retain sign text, copy signs & more! - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo (Kind of Dependency - Proxi) - [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - Adds the ability to walk around while in inventories - [Inventive Inventory](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventive-inventory) - Experience seamless inventory management in Minecraft with Inventive Inventory, your one-stop solution for sorting, auto-refilling, profiles and slot-locking. - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs - [Item Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders) - Add colored borders to inventory slots to make your rare items stand out! - [Item Obliterator](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-obliterator) - Modpack utility mod that allows to disable items and/or its interactions. Also removes them from creative tabs, recipes, trades, and JEI/REI/EMI. (I don't actually use this yet, but it's here for when I need it - Proxi) - [JJElytraSwap](https://modrinth.com/mod/jjelytraswap) - Mod that swaps elytra and chestplate when required. - [JsonEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/jsonem) - Dependency - [Just Another Structure Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/just-another-structure-pack) - Adds a few new structures to the Overworld. - [Just Player Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-player-heads) - Allows the collection of player heads via command or death event. - [Kiwi🥝](https://modrinth.com/mod/kiwi) - Dependency - [KleeSlabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/kleeslabs) - Break only the half of a double slab that you're looking at. - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - Optimizes the Minecraft networking stack. - [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages. - [Lapis Beacon Base [PurpurPack]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-lapis-beacon-base) - Allows using lapis blocks in a beacon base. - [Leaf Me Alone](https://modrinth.com/mod/leaf-me-alone) - Allows any rideable entity with controlling it passenger to phase trough leaves. - [Leather Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/leather-recycling) - Recycle armor, item frames and more into leather and rabbit hide. - [Liberty's Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/libertyvillagers) - Quality of Life improvements for Villagers. - [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty) - The Light Overlay Mod with a twist! - [Linkart](https://modrinth.com/mod/linkart) - Allows you to link your carts together via chains. - [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - A client-side schematic mod with extra features for creative mode work. - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod. - [Loort](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) - Makes it so nobody misses out on Loot! All loot chests are instanced per player and visually unique. (In the future this'll be transitioned to server pack and disabled client side so it won't be active in singleplayer - Proxi) - [Loyal Items](https://modrinth.com/datapack/loyal-items) - Your items will never despawn while waiting for your return after death. (Fallback in case there is a problem with graves, or alternative if you just don't like them. - Proxi) - [M.R.U](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru) - Dependency - [MES - Moog's End Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mes-moogs-end-structures) - Lots of Vanilla styled structures to fill up the end dimension with life!
